source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from live official Nissan USA model pages and Nissan Finance site access check

finance_snapshot.msrp: Nissan public page example vehicle shown price: $50,800.
finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Nissan public page example vehicle shown price: $50,800. $1,545 destination and handling charge referenced in Nissan's public Murano pricing disclaimer. Taxes, title, license, retailer fees, and options are excluded.
finance_snapshot.apr: Current APR was not cleanly exposed on the public Nissan model page in this pass; check Nissan Finance or retailer quoting for live programs.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use Nissan Finance or a retailer quote for current payment estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by approved credit, taxes, fees, lender terms, and structure.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Current public Nissan lease payment was not captured cleanly from the model page in this pass.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Public Nissan offers can vary by ZIP code, dealer, and time period; verify live offers before using them operationally.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See Nissan owner resources and manuals for current ownership documentation and vehicle details.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Shoppers who want Nissan's softer, comfort-focused midsize SUV positioning rather than a rugged three-row setup.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Murano leans into comfort and premium feel, which gives it a clearer identity than a generic midsize SUV pitch.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Shown-vehicle pricing sits high enough that Murano has to justify itself against stronger luxury-adjacent competition.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Nissan USA public model pages on March 26, 2026. Public HTML surfaced shown-vehicle pricing more clearly than a clean base MSRP in this pass.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Canonical image refreshed on March 27, 2026 from an official manufacturer image asset chosen for a cleaner vehicle render.
